title: Dinebra aegyptiaca
taxonomy: Dinebra aegyptiaca is classified within the family Poaceae. This classification places it among the grasses. Dinebra aegyptiaca is further categorized as a member of the tribe Paniceae. The genus Dinebra falls under the subfamily Panicoideae. Additionally, Dinebra aegyptiaca is classified as a species within the plant kingdom, specifically within the kingdom Plantae.
uses: Dinebra aegyptiaca is known to have various medicinal properties, primarily used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds.
